hinglish_text: Maine raat ko metformin 500mg li aur subah uthke ulti jaisi feeling thi
english_translation: I took metformin 500mg at night and in the morning I had nausea

hinglish_text: Amlodipine 5mg le raha hun aur bahut chakkar aa raha hai
english_translation: I am taking amlodipine 5mg and getting very dizzy

hinglish_text: Paracetamol khane ke baad rash ho gaya aur khujli bhi thi
english_translation: After taking paracetamol I got a rash and itching

hinglish_text: Aspirin le raha hun sar dard ke liye
english_translation: I am taking aspirin for headache

hinglish_text: Metformin lene ke baad chakkar nahi aaya
english_translation: After taking metformin dizziness did not occur

hinglish_text: Atorvastatin khane ke baad pair mein dard ho raha hai
english_translation: After taking atorvastatin I have pain in my legs

hinglish_text: Ibuprofen se pet mein jalan ho rahi hai
english_translation: I have burning sensation in stomach from ibuprofen

hinglish_text: Metoprolol aur amlodipine dono le raha hun, bahut thaka thaka lagta hai
english_translation: I am taking both metoprolol and amlodipine, feeling very fatigued

hinglish_text: Omeprazole le raha hun acidity ke liye, koi problem nahi hai
english_translation: Taking omeprazole for acidity, no problem

hinglish_text: Amoxicillin li thi infection ke liye aur 2 din baad dast lage
english_translation: Took amoxicillin for infection and got diarrhoea 2 days later

hinglish_text: Sertraline shuru ki aur neend bilkul nahi aa rahi
english_translation: Started sertraline and not sleeping at all

hinglish_text: Diazepam lene ke baad bahut neend aati hai din mein bhi
english_translation: After taking diazepam I get very sleepy even during the day

hinglish_text: Ciprofloxacin se tendons mein dard ho raha hai, doctor ne bola band karo
english_translation: Ciprofloxacin is causing tendon pain, doctor said to stop

hinglish_text: Main theek hun, koi dawa nahi le raha abhi
english_translation: I am fine, not taking any medicine now

hinglish_text: Losartan lena shuru kiya aur sir mein dard rehne laga
english_translation: Started losartan and started getting persistent headaches
